Sad.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَشْكُوا۟ بَثِّى وَحُزْنِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
Sad.translation: He said, "I only complain of my suffering and my grief to Allah, and I know from Allah that which you do not know."

Sad.arabic: وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّ ٱلْعِزَّةَ لِلَّهِ جَمِيعًا ۚ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
Sad.translation: And let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, honor [due to power] belongs to Allah entirely. He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

Sad.arabic: وَلَا تَهِنُوا۟ وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَوْنَ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
Sad.translation: So do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are [true] believers.

Sad.arabic: إِذْ يَقُولُ لِصَاحِبِهِ لَا تَحْزَنْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَنَا
Sad.translation: ...when he said to his companion, "Do not grieve; indeed Allah is with us."

Sad.arabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
Sad.translation: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

Anxious.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ
Anxious.translation: Those who have believed and whose hearts are assured by the remembrance of Allah. Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured.

Anxious.arabic: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ
Anxious.translation: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him.

Anxious.arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
Anxious.translation: Allah does not charge a soul except [with that within] its capacity.
For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.

Lonely.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ ۖ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
Lonely.translation: [Allah] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see."

Lonely.arabic: وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌۖ أُجِيبُ دَعۡوَةَ ٱلدَّاعِ إِذَا دَعَانِ
Lonely.translation: And when My servants ask you, [O Muhammad], concerning Me - indeed I am near. I respond to the invocation of the supplicant when he calls upon Me.

Lonely.arabic: إِذْ يَقُولُ لِصَاحِبِهِ لَا تَحْزَنْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَنَا
Lonely.translation: ...when he said to his companion, "Do not grieve; indeed Allah is with us."

Lonely.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
Lonely.translation: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.
...and He is with you wherever you are.

Angry.arabic: وَٱلْكَٰظِمِينَ ٱلْغَيْظَ وَٱلْعَافِينَ عَنِ ٱلنَّاسِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
Angry.translation: ...and who restrain anger and who pardon the people - and Allah loves the doers of good.

Angry.arabic: وَلَمَّا رَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبَٰنَ أَسِفًا
Angry.translation: And when Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved...

Angry.arabic: وَذَا ٱلنُّونِ إِذ ذَّهَبَ مُغَٰضِبًا فَظَنَّ أَن لَّن نَّقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ
Angry.translation: And [remember] the man of the fish, when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him.

Angry.arabic: وَلَمَّا سَكَتَ عَن مُّوسَى ٱلْغَضَبُ أَخَذَ ٱلْأَلْوَاحَ
Angry.translation: And when the anger subsided in Moses, he took up the tablets...

Angry.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ وَإِذَا مَا غَضِبُوا۟ هُمْ يَغْفِرُونَ
Angry.translation: And those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, and when they are angry, they forgive.

Grateful.arabic: وَإِذْ تَأَذَّنَ رَبُّكُمْ لَئِن شَكَرْتُمْ لَأَزِيدَنَّكُمْ
Grateful.translation: And [remember] when your Lord proclaimed, 'If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor]...'

Grateful.arabic: فَاذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِي وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ
Grateful.translation: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

Grateful.arabic: ٱعْمَلُوٓا۟ ءَالَ دَاوُۥدَ شُكْرًا ۚ وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنْ عِبَادِىَ ٱلشَّكُورُ
Grateful.translation: ..., "Work, O family of David, in gratitude." And few of My servants are grateful.

Grateful.arabic: أَنِ ٱشْكُرْ لِلَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَشْكُرْ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ
Grateful.translation: ..."Be grateful to Allah." And whoever is grateful is grateful for [the benefit of] himself.

Grateful.arabic: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ
Grateful.translation: Rather, worship Allah and be among the grateful.

Thankful.arabic: مَا يَفْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بِعَذَابِكُمْ إِن شَكَرْتُمْ وَءَامَنتُمْ
Thankful.translation: What would Allah do with your punishment if you are grateful and believe?

Thankful.arabic: وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
Thankful.translation: And eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He likes not those who commit excess.

Thankful.arabic: وَءَاتَىٰكُم مِّن كُلِّ مَا سَأَلْتُمُوهُ ۚ وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ
Thankful.translation: And He gave you from all you asked of Him. And if you should count the favor of Allah, you could not enumerate them.
...and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

Thankful.arabic: وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۙ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
Thankful.translation: ...and He made for you hearing and vision and intellect that perhaps you would be grateful.

Happy.arabic: قُلْ بِفَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ وَبِرَحْمَتِهِۦ فَبِذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَفْرَحُوا۟
Happy.translation: Say, "In the bounty of Allah and in His mercy - in that let them rejoice..."

Happy.arabic: فَرِحِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ
Happy.translation: Rejoicing in what Allah has bestowed upon them of His bounty...
faces, that Day, will be radiant.
faces, that Day, will be bright.

Celebration.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ
Celebration.translation: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown their deeds.

Celebration.arabic: جَنَّٰتِ عَدْنٍ يَدْخُلُونَهَا وَمَن صَلَحَ مِنْ ءَابَآئِهِمْ وَأَزْوَٰجِهِمْ وَذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ
Celebration.translation: Gardens of perpetual residence, which they will enter, with whoever was righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their descendants.

Celebration.arabic: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيْكُم بِمَا صَبَرْتُمْ ۚ فَنِعْمَ عُقْبَى ٱلدَّارِ
Celebration.translation: , "Peace be upon you for what you patiently endured. And excellent is the final home."

Celebration.arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْجَنَّةِ زُمَرًا
Celebration.translation: But those who feared their Lord will be driven to Paradise in groups.

Celebration.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى صَدَقَنَا وَعْدَهُۥ وَأَوْرَثَنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ نَتَبَوَّأُ مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ حَيْثُ نَشَآءُ
Celebration.translation: And they will say, "Praise has been to Allah, who has fulfilled for us His promise and made us inherit the earth [so] we may settle in Paradise wherever we will."

Hopeful.arabic: قُلْ يَٰعِبَادِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَا تَقْنَطُوا۟ مِن رَّحْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ
Hopeful.translation: Say, "O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allah."

Hopeful.arabic: وَلَا تَيْـَٔسُوا۟ مِن رَّوْحِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يَيْـَٔسُ مِن رَّوْحِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلْقَوْمُ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ
Hopeful.translation: And despair not of relief from Allah. Indeed, no one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people.

Hopeful.arabic: وَأَنَا غَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحًا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
Hopeful.translation: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.

Hopeful.arabic: يَمْحُوا۟ ٱللَّهُ مَا يَشَآءُ وَيُثْبِتُ ۖ وَعِندَهُۥٓ أُمُّ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ
Hopeful.translation: Allah eliminates what He wills or confirms, and with Him is the Mother of the Book.
And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

Depressed.translation: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].

Depressed.arabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ
Depressed.translation: Do they not see that We made the night for them to rest in...

Depressed.arabic: يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ أَن يُخَفِّفَ عَنكُمْ ۚ وَخُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ ضَعِيفًا
Depressed.translation: Allah wants to lighten for you [your difficulties]; and mankind was created weak.

Depressed.arabic: فَمَن كَانَ مَرْجُوًّا لِّقَآءَ رَبِّهِۦ فَلْيَعْمَلْ عَمَلاً صَٰلِحًا
Depressed.translation: So whoever would hope for the meeting with his Lord - let him do righteous work...

Stressed.arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
Stressed.translation: Allah does not charge a soul except [with that within] its capacity.
For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
And seek help through patience and prayer...

Stressed.arabic: قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَآ إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَنَا هُوَ مَوْلَىٰنَا
Stressed.translation: Say, "Never will we be struck except by what Allah has decreed for us; He is our protector."

Lost.translation: And He found you lost and guided [you].

Lost.arabic: يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ لِيُبَيِّنَ لَكُمْ وَيَهْدِيَكُمْ سُنَنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ
Lost.translation: Allah wants to make clear to you [the lawful from the unlawful] and guide you to the [good] practices of those before you...

Lost.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ هُدَى ٱللَّهِ هُوَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ
Lost.translation: Say, "Indeed, the guidance of Allah is the [only] guidance..."

Lost.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ قَدْ جَآءَتْكُم مَّوْعِظَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَشِفَآءٌ لِّمَا فِى ٱلصُّدُورِ وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةٌ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
Lost.translation: O mankind, there has to come to you instruction from your Lord and healing for what is in the breasts and guidance and mercy for the believers.

Lost.arabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ
Lost.translation: And if you are in doubt about what We have sent down upon Our Servant [Muhammad], then produce a surah the like thereof.

Guilty.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ سُوٓءًا أَوْ يَظْلِمْ نَفْسَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَسْتَغْفِرِ ٱللَّهَ يَجِدِ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
Guilty.translation: And whoever does a wrong or wrongs himself but then seeks forgiveness of Allah will find Allah Forgiving and Merciful.

Guilty.arabic: وَءَاخَرُونَ ٱعْتَرَفُوا۟ بِذُنُوبِهِمْ خَلَطُوا۟ عَمَلاً صَٰلِحًا وَءَاخَرَ سَيِّئًا عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتُوبَ عَلَيْهِمْ
Guilty.translation: And [there are] others who have acknowledged their sins. They had mixed a righteous deed with another that was bad. Perhaps Allah will accept their repentance.

Guilty.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يَقْبَلُ ٱلتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ
Guilty.translation: And it is He who accepts repentance from his servants and pardons misdeeds...

Guilty.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلاً صَٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ حَسَنَٰتٍ
Guilty.translation: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good.

Guilty.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا فَعَلُوا۟ فَٰحِشَةً أَوْ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ ذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَٱسْتَغْفَرُوا۟ لِذُنُوبِهِمْ
Guilty.translation: And those who, when they commit an immorality or wrong themselves [by transgression], remember Allah and seek forgiveness for their sins...

Heartbroken.arabic: وَاصْبِرْ وَمَا صَبْرُكَ إِلَّا بِٱللَّهِ ۚ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُ فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
Heartbroken.translation: And be patient, [O Muhammad], and your patience is not but through Allah. And do not grieve over them and do not be in distress over what they conspire.
...They were touched by poverty and hardship and were shaken...

Heartbroken.arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
Heartbroken.translation: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

Heartbroken.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
Heartbroken.translation: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
And those who strive for Us - We will surely guide them to Our ways.

Fearful.arabic: وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُم بِشَىْءٍ مِّنَ ٱلْخَوْفِ وَٱلْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْوَٰلِ وَٱلْأَنفُسِ وَٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ
Fearful.translation: And We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger and a loss of wealth and lives and fruits...

Fearful.arabic: فَلَا تَخَافُوهُمْ وَخَافُونِ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
Fearful.translation: So fear them not, but fear Me, if you are [indeed] believers.

Fearful.arabic: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَافٍ عَبْدَهُۥ ۖ وَيُخَوِّفُونَكَ بِٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦ
Fearful.translation: Is not Allah sufficient for His Servant? And [yet], they threaten you with those other than Him.
Let them worship the Lord of this House.

Fearful.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
Fearful.translation: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger, and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

Seeking Peace.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ
Seeking Peace.translation: Those who have believed and whose hearts are assured by the remembrance of Allah. Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured.

Seeking Peace.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ لِيَزْدَادُوٓا۟ إِيمَٰنًا مَّعَ إِيمَٰنِهِمْ
Seeking Peace.translation: It is He who sent down tranquility into the hearts of the believers that they would increase in faith along with their [present] faith.

Seeking Peace.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ يَدْعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ دَارِ ٱلسَّلَٰمِ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
Seeking Peace.translation: And Allah invites to the Home of Peace and guides whom He wills to a straight path.

Seeking Peace.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ فِى ٱلسِّلْمِ كَآفَّةً
Seeking Peace.translation: O you who have believed, enter into Islam completely [and perfectly]...

Seeking Peace.arabic: لَهُمْ دَارُ ٱلسَّلَٰمِ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ ۖ وَهُوَ وَلِيُّهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
Seeking Peace.translation: For them will be the Home of Peace with their Lord. And He is their protecting ally because of what they used to do.

Seeking Forgiveness.arabic: وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
Seeking Forgiveness.translation: And seek forgiveness of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

Seeking Forgiveness.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَآ إِن نَّسِينَآ أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا
Seeking Forgiveness.translation: "Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we have forgotten or erred."

Seeking Forgiveness.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
Seeking Forgiveness.translation: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.

Seeking Forgiveness.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
Seeking Forgiveness.translation: And, [O Muhammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."

Seeking Forgiveness.arabic: وَأَنِ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ
Seeking Forgiveness.translation: And [commanding you]: "Seek forgiveness of your Lord and repent to Him."

Low Iman.arabic: إِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَإِذَا تُلِيَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَٰتُهُۥ زَادَتْهُمْ إِيمَٰنًا
Low Iman.translation: ...when Allah is mentioned, their hearts become fearful, and when His verses are recited to them, it increases them in faith...

Low Iman.arabic: أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَن تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ
Low Iman.translation: Has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of Allah...

Low Iman.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
Low Iman.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

Low Iman.arabic: قَالَتِ ٱلْأَعْرَابُ ءَامَنَّا ۖ قُل لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ وَلَٰكِن قُولُوٓا۟ أَسْلَمْنَا وَلَمَّا يَدْخُلِ ٱلْإِيمَٰنُ فِى قُلُوبِكُمْ
Low Iman.translation: The bedouins say, "We have believed." Say, "You have not [yet] believed; but say [instead], 'We have submitted,' for faith has not yet entered your hearts."
So remind with the Qur'an whoever fears My threat.

Need Motivation.arabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
Need Motivation.translation: And that there is not for man except that for which he strives.
And that his effort is going to be seen.
So race to [all that is] good.

Need Motivation.arabic: وَسَارِعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ
Need Motivation.translation: And hasten to forgiveness from your Lord and a garden...
So for this let the competitors compete.

Patience.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ
Patience.translation: O you who have believed, seek help through patience and prayer. Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes.
And will reward them for what they patiently endured with a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

Patience.arabic: إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّٰبِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
Patience.translation: Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account.

Tawakkul.arabic: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ
Tawakkul.translation: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him.

Tawakkul.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِى لَا يَمُوتُ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِهِۦ
Tawakkul.translation: And rely upon the Ever-Living who does not die, and exalt [Allah] with His praise.

Tawakkul.arabic: فَإِذَا عَزَمْتَ فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُتَوَكِّلِينَ
Tawakkul.translation: And when you have decided, then rely upon Allah. Indeed, Allah loves those who rely [upon Him].

Tawakkul.arabic: فَقَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِّلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
Tawakkul.translation: So they said, "Upon Allah do we rely. Our Lord, make us not [objects of] trial for the wrongdoing people."

Tawakkul.arabic: إِن يَنصُرْكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فَلَا غَالِبَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَإِن يَخْذُلْكُمْ فَمَن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يَنصُرُكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ
Tawakkul.translation: If Allah should aid you, no one can overcome you; but if He should forsake you, who is there that can aid you after Him?

hadithCollection.translation: Verily, deeds are only with intentions.
Fasting is a shield.
The best among you is he who learns and teaches the Qur'an.
The religion is sincere advice.
Cleanliness is half of faith.
Modesty is a branch of faith.
Do not become angry.
He who does not show mercy will not be shown mercy.

hadithCollection.arabic: الْيَدُ الْعُلْيَا خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْيَدِ السُّفْلَى
hadithCollection.translation: The upper hand is better than the lower hand.

hadithCollection.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadithCollection.translation: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.

hadithCollection.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
hadithCollection.translation: A Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hands the Muslims are safe.

hadithCollection.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
hadithCollection.translation: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.

hadithCollection.arabic: دَعْ مَا يَرِيبُكَ إِلَى مَا لَا يَرِيبُكَ
hadithCollection.translation: Leave what makes you doubt for what does not make you doubt.

hadithCollection.arabic: كُنْ فِي الدُّنْيَا كَأَنَّكَ غَرِيبٌ أَوْ عَابِرُ سَبِيلٍ
hadithCollection.translation: Be in this world as if you were a stranger or a traveler.
Every innovation is a misguidance.

hadithCollection.arabic: أَحَبُّ الْأَعْمَالِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَدْوَمُهَا وَإِنْ قَلَّ
hadithCollection.translation: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those that are consistent, even if small.
Say: "I believe in Allah," and then be steadfast.
Fear Allah wherever you are.
And follow up a bad deed with a good deed, which will wipe it out.
Be mindful of Allah, and He will protect you.
If you ask, ask only of Allah.
And if you seek help, seek it from Allah.
Indeed, Allah is beautiful and He loves beauty.
A person is with those whom he loves.

hadithCollection.arabic: مِنْ حُسْنِ إِسْلَامِ الْمَرْءِ تَرْكُهُ مَا لَا يَعْنِيهِ
hadithCollection.translation: Part of the perfection of a person's Islam is his leaving that which does not concern him.

hadithCollection.arabic: لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
hadithCollection.translation: The strong man is not the one who can wrestle, but the one who controls himself in a fit of rage.
Righteousness is good character.

hadithCollection.arabic: لَنْ يُدْخِلَ أَحَدًا مِنْكُمْ عَمَلُهُ الْجَنَّةَ
hadithCollection.translation: None of you will enter Paradise by his deeds alone.
Spread peace.
Take advantage of five before five.

allahNames.meaning: The Possessor of Majesty and Honour

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillāh
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ فِي أَوَّلِهِ وَآخِرِهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhi fī awwalihi wa ākhirih
duas.translation: In the Name of Allah at the beginning and at the end.
duas.occasion: Forgetting to say Bismillah before eating

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillāhil-ladhī aṭ`amanā wa saqānā wa ja`alanā minal muslimīn
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah who has given us food and drink and made us Muslims.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا، وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِّنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alḥamdu lillāhi alladhī aṭ`amanī hādhā, wa razaqanīhi min ghayri ḥawlin minnī wa lā quwwah
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, who fed me this and provided it for me without any power or might from myself.
duas.source: Sunan Abi Dawud 4023, Jami` at-Tirmidhi 3458, Sunan Ibn Majah 3285

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَأَطْعِمْنَا خَيْرًا مِنْهُ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma bārik lanā fīhi wa aṭ`imnā khayran minh
duas.translation: O Allah, bless it for us and feed us better than it.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma bismika amūtu wa aḥyā
duas.translation: O Allah, with Your name I die and I live.

duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ رَبِّي وَضَعْتُ جَنْبِي، وَبِكَ أَرْفَعُهُ، فَإِنْ أَمْسَكْتَ نَفْسِي فَارْحَمْهَا، وَإِنْ أَرْسَلْتَهَا فَاحْفَظْهَا بِمَا تَحْفَظُ بِهِ عِبَادَكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
duas.transliteration: Bismika Rabbī waḍa`tu janbī, wa bika arfa`uh, fa'in amsakta nafsī farḥamhā, wa in arsaltahā faḥfaẓhā bimā taḥfaẓu bihī `ibādakaṣ-ṣāliḥīn
duas.translation: In Your name my Lord, I lie down and in Your name I rise, so if You should take my soul then have mercy upon it, and if You should return my soul then protect it in the manner You do so with Your righteous servants.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alḥamdu lillāhil-ladhī aḥyānā ba`da mā amātanā wa ilayhin-nushūr
duas.translation: All praise belongs to Allah Who has restored us back to life after causing us to die; and to Him shall we return.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي وَافْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma-ghfir lī dhunūbī wa-ftaḥ lī abwāba raḥmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive my sins and open for me the gates of Your mercy.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka min faḍlik
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Your bounty.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhi tawakkaltu `alallāh, lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā billāh
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhi walajnā, wa bismillāhi kharajnā, wa `alā rabbinā tawakkalnā
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subḥānal-ladhī sakhkhara lanā hādhā wa mā kunnā lahū muqrinīn, wa innā ilā rabbinā lamunqalibūn
duas.translation: Glory be to the One Who has subjected this for us, for we could not have done so by ourselves. And to our Lord we shall return.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innā nas'aluka fī safarinā hādhal-birra wat-taqwā, wa minal-`amali mā tarḍā
duas.translation: O Allah, we ask You for righteousness and piety in this journey of ours, and deeds that please You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣayyiban nāfi`ā
duas.translation: O Allah, (bring) beneficial rain clouds.

duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Muṭirnā bifaḍlillāhi wa raḥmatih
duas.translation: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a`ūdhu bika minal-hammi wal-ḥazan, wal-`ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa ḍala`id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijāl
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being overpowered by men.

duas.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
duas.transliteration: Ḥasbunallāhu wa ni`mal-wakīl
duas.translation: Sufficient for us is Allah, and He is the best disposer of affairs.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā anta subḥānaka innī kuntu minaẓ-ẓālimīn
duas.translation: There is no god but You, glory be to You; indeed, I was among the wrongdoers.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma lā sahla illā mā ja`altahū sahlā, wa anta taj`alul-ḥazna idhā shi'ta sahlā
duas.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except what You make easy, and You make difficulty easy if You wish.
duas.source: Sahih Ibn Hibban 974, Al-Bayhaqi in Ad-Da`awat Al-Kabir

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي، وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي، وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Allāhummanfa`nī bimā `allamtanī, wa `allimnī mā yanfa`unī, wa zidnī `ilmā
duas.translation: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alḥamdu lillāh
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah.

duas.arabic: يَرْحَمُكَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Yarḥamukallāh
duas.translation: May Allah have mercy on you.

duas.arabic: يَهْدِيكُمُ اللَّهُ وَيُصْلِحُ بَالَكُمْ
duas.transliteration: Yahdīkumullāhu wa yuṣliḥu bālakum
duas.translation: May Allah guide you and set your affairs in order.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma anta ḥassanta khalqī fa ḥassin khuluqī
duas.translation: O Allah, just as You have made my external features beautiful, make my character beautiful as well.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subḥānal-ladhī yusabbiḥur-ra`du biḥamdihī wal-malā'ikatu min khīfatih
duas.translation: Glory is to Him Whom thunder and angels glorify due to fear of Him.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma lakal-ḥamdu anta kasawtanīh, as'aluka min khayrihī wa khayri mā ṣuni`a lah, wa a`ūdhu bika min sharrihī wa sharri mā ṣuni`a lah
duas.translation: O Allah, praise is to You. You have clothed me. I ask You for its goodness and the goodness of what it was made for, and I seek Your protection from its evil and the evil of what it was made for.

duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Aṣbaḥnā wa aṣbaḥal-mulku lillāh, wal-ḥamdu lillāh, lā ilāha illallāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah
duas.translation: We have reached the morning and the dominion belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, He has no partner.

duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Amsaynā wa amsal-mulku lillāh, wal-ḥamdu lillāh, lā ilāha illallāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah
duas.translation: We have reached the evening and the dominion belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, He has no partner.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhil-ladhī lā yaḍurru ma`a-smihī shay'un fil-arḍi wa lā fis-samā'i wa huwas-samī`ul-`alīm
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can harm on earth or in heaven, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

duas.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيًّا
duas.transliteration: Raḍītu billāhi rabbā, wa bil-islāmi dīnā, wa bi Muḥammadin nabiyyā
duas.translation: I am pleased with Allah as Lord, with Islam as religion, and with Muhammad as Prophet.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subḥānallāhi wa biḥamdih
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah and all praise is due to Him.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: Lā ilāha illallāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-ḥamd, wa huwa `alā kulli shay'in qadīr
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, He has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He has power over all things.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbanā ātinā fid-dunyā ḥasanah wa fil-ākhirati ḥasanah wa qinā `adhāban-nār
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'alukal-`āfiyata fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
duas.source: Sunan Ibn Majah 3871, Sunan Abi Dawud 5074

duas.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ
duas.transliteration: Yā Ḥayyu yā Qayyūm, bi raḥmatika astaghīth
duas.translation: O Ever-Living, O Self-Subsisting Sustainer of all, I seek help through Your mercy.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي، وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbishraḥ lī ṣadrī, wa yassir lī amrī
duas.translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest, and ease for me my task.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ، وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ، وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ، وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a`ūdhu bika min zawāli ni`matik, wa taḥawwuli `āfiyatik, wa fujā'ati niqmatik, wa jamī`i sakhaṭik
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the decline of Your blessings, the change of Your well-being, the suddenness of Your punishment, and all that displeases You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشِرْكِهِ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma `ālimal-ghaybi wash-shahādah, fāṭiras-samāwāti wal-arḍ, rabba kulli shay'in wa malīkah, ashhadu an lā ilāha illā ant, a`ūdhu bika min sharri nafsī, wa min sharrish-shayṭāni wa shirkih
duas.translation: O Allah, Knower of the unseen and the seen, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Lord and Sovereign of all things, I bear witness that there is no god but You. I seek refuge in You from the evil of my soul, and from the evil of Satan and his shirk.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَاهْدِنِي، وَعَافِنِي، وَارْزُقْنِي
duas.transliteration: Allāhummaghfir lī, warḥamnī, wahdinī, wa `āfinī, warzuqnī
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, grant me well-being, and provide for me.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a`ūdhu bika min `adhābil-qabr, wa min `adhābin-nār, wa min fitnatil-maḥyā wal-mamāt, wa min fitnatil-masīḥid-dajjāl
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the punishment of the Fire, from the trials of life and death, and from the trial of the Dajjal.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbanaghfir lī wa liwālidayya wa lil-mu'minīna yawma yaqūmul-ḥisāb
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive me, my parents, and the believers on the Day the account is established.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbirḥamhumā kamā rabbayānī ṣaghīrā
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy on them as they raised me when I was small.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي، فَاغْفِرْ لِي، فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma anta rabbī lā ilāha illā ant, khalaqtanī wa ana `abduk, wa ana `alā `ahdika wa wa`dika mastaṭa`t, a`ūdhu bika min sharri mā ṣana`t, abū'u laka bini`matika `alayy, wa abū'u laka bidhambī, faghfir lī, fa innahū lā yaghfiru-dhunūba illā ant
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord. There is no god except You. You created me and I am Your slave, and I am faithful to my covenant and promise to You as much as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favors upon me, and I confess my sins. So forgive me, for none forgives sins except You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a`ūdhu bika minal-kufri wal-faqr, wa a`ūdhu bika min `adhābil-qabr, lā ilāha illā ant
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief and poverty, and I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave. There is no god except You.
